title: Torrezx-Ominus tools
description: Ominus tools temathic replace diamond tools
body:
Torrezx-Ominus tools

Español
Debieron meter herramientas o un mineral nuevo a las trial chambers? te quedaste con ganas de mas? entonces este texturepack es para ti,agrega las herramientas Ominus,inspiradas en un ambiente agresivo,mistico y oxidado.

English
Did they add new tools or a new mineral to the trial chambers? Did you want more? Then this texture pack is for you. It adds the Ominus tools, inspired by an aggressive, mystical, and rusty environment.

1.21.5x-1.21.11 Rename in anvil tools copper,iron,diamond and netherite to:

-Ominus sword

-Ominus pickaxe

-Ominus bow

-Ominus axe

-Ominus shovel

-Ominus hoe

-Ominus crossbow

In 1.20x-1.21x-1.21.4 Reemplaza-Replace :
-Diamond tools

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-No requiere de ningún complemento-Does not require any complement

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
